ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s ecosystem rebound, with tokenized stock trading and ecosystem tokens like Jito and Sol Strategies driving discussion. Despite SOL reclaiming $72, onchain data points to weakening momentum as TVL and DEX volumes decline.
ctxTalking:
• Jito’s $1.75B revenue milestone and its role in recent price action
• Tokenized stock trading fueling double-digit gains for Solana DAT stocks and ecosystem tokens
• MoneyGram joining Solana as an infrastructure partner and validator
ctxMatters: Ecosystem growth from tokenized assets and new institutional partners highlights Solana’s expanding use cases. However, declining TVL and DEX volumes suggest underlying activity may not match headline price moves. Institutional interest and infrastructure partnerships could influence future network development.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Revenue milestones and institutional partnerships indicate real ecosystem traction.
Noise: Short-term price rallies without corresponding onchain activity may not reflect sustained growth.
ctxGlossary:
TVL — Total Value Locked; a measure of assets deposited in DeFi protocols.
DAT stocks — Digital Asset Tokenized stocks, representing real-world equities on-chain.

readMore.title: Jito hits $1.75B revenue milestone, but what does this mean for its price rally?
SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
Aave, Solana ecosystem tokens lead crypto rebound as bitcoin steadies near $60,000
